# ZenHub CLI / MCP

> MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and CLI for managing WhatsApp campaigns, schedules, ZenChat conversations and contacts on the ZenHub platform. Published on npm as `zenhub-mcp` (stdio MCP server) and `zenhub-cli` (terminal CLI).

## For AI agents configuring this MCP for a user

Read the **"Instructions for AI agents"** section at the top of [README.md](https://github.com/zenhubpro/zenhub-cli/blob/main/README.md) — it's the first H2 in the file. It includes:

- Step-by-step flow (identify client → get API key → locate config file → apply config → restart → validate)
- Config file paths for every supported client (Claude Desktop on macOS/Windows/Linux, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, VS Code)
- JSON and TOML snippets to insert
- Troubleshooting table
- Validation phrase to test the install

## Most common config

Client: Claude Desktop. File: `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` (macOS) or `%APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json` (Windows). Content:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "zenhub": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "zenhub-mcp"],
      "env": { "ZENHUB_API_KEY": "agwpp_live_..." }
    }
  }
}
```

API keys are generated at https://www.zenhub.pro/settings/integrations.

## Official docs

https://docs.zenhub.pro
